# Author notes

Method name: GraphTune.

Task: temporal node ranking on WebGraph-24.

Main result: GraphTune obtains 42.7% Recall@20; the strongest supplied baseline obtains 39.1%.

The run count and uncertainty are not supplied.

The method description cites \cite{smith2025ranking} and the main result is in Table~\ref{tab:main} with \label{tab:main}.

Boundary: only one temporal Web graph was evaluated; no deployment study was performed.
